title: MC More 0.5 Wretched Wraith
description: The Minecraft More Mod as seen in Alexander's Fun And Games on YouTube!
body:
**MC More 0.5 is the mod seen in the Minecraft More series on my YouTube channel, Alexander's Fun And Games. Both the series and mod are unfinished and discontinued. The mod is unfinished, so is probably a bit glitchy, but it still has plenty of content! This mod features tons of new stuff from Minecraft Dungeons, Minecraft Earth, Minecraft Story Mode and some of my own creations, Enjoy!**

 

 

This mod was made using the [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) modloader, and will only work when played using Forge

 

This mod was made in Minecraft 1.15.2 using Forge 1.15.2-31.1.0, so try that if you're having trouble with other versions.

 

 

This mod has loads of content, so explore! See what piques your interest.

 

This mod features:

. Wooly Creepers (new)

. Wraiths (Minecraft Dungeons)

. The Wretched Wraith (Minecraft Dungeons)

. Summoners (Minecraft Dungeons)

. Enchanters (Minecraft Dungeons)

. Redstone Golems (Minecraft Dungeons)

and much more!

 ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HjgFxrKS/images/86c5b29ade5e65d7e6846c0ac870c2532db99e46.png)

 

If you like this mod, you might like some of [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/AlexandersFunAndGames), which are all a much higher quality than this mod.

**MC More 0.5 and all of my other mods are also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/alexandersfunandgames/projects)!**
